channel.title: Jarkko Moilanen - Insights
channel.description: Writing on data products, AI product portfolios, open standards, governance, and delivery.

item.title: Golden Data Product Portfolio
item.description: A Golden Data Product Portfolio helps leaders turn many separate data and AI ideas into one stronger implementation case.

item.title: Agentic Data Product Operations: The Next Maturity Layer for AI Data Product Management
item.description: Why data and AI product work needs a visible operating layer where humans and AI agents can share workflows, approvals, evidence, and governance.

item.title: Data Product Standards Must Become AI Agent Native
item.description: Why data product standards need to become agent-native so AI agents can read, validate, connect, and operate them.

item.title: 9 Actions We Took to Make Open Data Product Vocabulary AI-Agent-First
item.description: How the Open Data Product Vocabulary was reshaped so people, tools, and AI agents can use the same product language.
